examples: He borrowed a friend's surfboard and paddled out into the ocean at sunset.
In Santa Cruz, California, Santa Claus arrives on a surfboard, wearing a red wetsuit.
XT is for bike enthusiasts, people who ride a lot but also have maybe a surfboard, a snowboard.
Nine miles is a long way to lug a surfboard on your back (plus camping equipment).
The typical surfboard is a slab of petroleum-spawned polyurethane slathered in layers of toxic polyester resin.
